parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: 'AWS Security Alert: ' + $('Normalize').item.json.title, blocks: [ { type: 'header', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: 'AWS Security Alert' } }, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*' + $('Normalize').item.json.title + '*\nSeverity: `' + $('Normalize').item.json.severity.label + '` (' + $('Normalize').item.json.severity.numeric + ')\nAccount: `' + $('Normalize').item.json.resource.accountId + '` / Region: `' + $('Normalize').item.json.resource.region + '`' } }, { type: 'divider' }, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: (($json.result && $json.result.summary) || $json.summary || JSON.stringify($json)).substring(0, 2900) } } ] }) }}
